text:
Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 MULSCL_COMBINED_EVER Multiple Sclerosis and Transverse Myelitis - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 MULSCL_MEDICAID_EVER Multiple Sclerosis and Transverse Myelitis - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 MULSCL_MEDICAR_EVER Multiple Sclerosis and Transverse Myelitis - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever
